metadata.description: Supply chain maps for thematic discovery. Maps catalyst themes to stocks via industry chain.

india_data_center_fdi.description: Govt of India approves FDI for data centers. Supply chain: land -> power -> construction -> cooling -> fiber -> operations.

land_power.description: Land acquisition, power generation, transmission, green energy for DCs

ADANIGREEN.NS.thesis: Primary beneficiary of Adani nexus + RE for DCs

NTPC.NS.thesis: Govt power utility, likely designated DC power partner

POWERGRID.NS.thesis: Transmission backbone for data center clusters

TATAPOWER.NS.thesis: Private power + green push, strong execution

construction_civil.description: Data center shell construction, MEP, cooling towers

LT.NS.thesis: Largest EPC contractor, gets marquee infra

ACE.NS.thesis: Crane & material handling at DC sites

KALPATPOWR.NS.thesis: Power transmission EPC, DC cluster wiring

cooling_hvac.description: Precision cooling, HVAC, thermal management for DCs

BLUESTARCO.NS.thesis: Commercial HVAC leader, DC cooling contracts

HAVELLS.NS.thesis: Electrical + switchgear for DC power dist

VOLTAS.NS.thesis: AC & cooling JV with global DC players

fiber_connectivity.description: Subsea cables, fiber, 5G backhaul, IX connectivity

RELIANCE.NS.thesis: Ambani nexus + Jio cloud infra play

it_services_operations.description: DC operations, managed services, cloud infra deployment

HCLTECH.NS.thesis: IT infra mgmt, DC migration services

india_semiconductor_fab.description: India semiconductor fab incentives ( ₹76,000cr scheme). Supply chain: raw materials -> fab equipment -> ATMP -> design IP.

HINDZINC.NS.thesis: Zinc, specialty metals for chip packaging

VEDL.NS.thesis: JV with Foxconn for chip fab in Gujarat

CGPOWER.NS.thesis: Motors, transformers for fab power infrastructure

NA.link: No direct India-listed pure-play design IP
NA.thesis: Consider global ADRs: ARM, NVDA, AMD

us_ai_infrastructure.description: US AI datacenter buildout: power, cooling, GPUs, networking, real estate.

VST.thesis: Nuclear + gas for AI DC power, largest US beneficiary

CEG.thesis: Nuclear restart for Microsoft AI DCs

NRG.thesis: Gas peaker for DC backup power

ITT.thesis: Pumps and flow for liquid cooling

EQIX.thesis: Global DC REIT, AI rack expansion

MRVL.thesis: Custom silicon, optical interconnects for AI

us_defense_ai.description: Pentagon AI + autonomous weapons spending surge. JADC2, drone swarms, AI targeting.
us_defense_ai.thesis: AI-driven warfare is bipartisan priority. Anduril (private) and Palantir are purest plays. Traditional defense primes (Lockheed, RTX) lag but have scale.

global_battery_supply_chain.description: EV + grid battery demand. Lithium, graphite, cathode materials, cell makers, recycling.

MP.thesis: Rare earths + magnet materials for EV motors

corruption_indicators.description: For markets where corruption and crony capitalism drive contract allocation, these patterns predict winners.

india.pattern: Infrastructure/govt contracts flow to politically connected conglomerates. Adani = energy/infra. Ambani = telecom/retail/energy. Gadkari proximity = road/transport infra.
india.trade_logic: Buy on contract announcement, don't hold through delivery (overruns common). Exit on pledge news, regulatory probe, or Hindenburg-style reports.

china.pattern: State-directed: SOEs win stated industries. Private tech wins only with Party blessing.
china.trade_logic: Follow Five-Year Plan sectors. Avoid if CAC crackdown narrative active.

saudi.pattern: PIF-linked entities get all mega-projects. Western firms enter via joint-venture.
saudi.trade_logic: Buy PIF-driven sectors at announcement. Be wary of Vision 2030 execution delays.
